hero.headline: Shoolini Online MBA in Real Estate Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved 2-year programme with Pay After Placement and NAAC A+ accreditation

sections.tldr: Shoolini Online MBA in Real Estate Management covers property valuation, RERA compliance, real estate finance, land acquisition, construction project management, and real estate marketing. PAP option Rs 1,50,000 or opt-out Rs 1,30,000. NAAC A+. NIRF #69 University. No other UGC-DEB online MBA in India offers a dedicated Real Estate Management specialisation.

about.body:
Real Estate Management is one of the rarest MBA specialisations in India's online space. As India's real estate sector formalises under RERA regulations, digitises through PropTech, and professionalises through REITs and institutional investment, demand for management professionals with real estate domain knowledge alongside MBA credentials is growing.

Shoolini University Online's MBA in Real Estate Management covers property valuation and appraisal, RERA regulatory compliance, real estate finance and mortgage management, land acquisition and due diligence, construction project management, real estate marketing and CRM, and PropTech and property platform management. The programme is designed for real estate developers, property brokers seeking formal credentials, construction company managers, and finance professionals working in real estate lending.

No other UGC-DEB approved online MBA in India offers a dedicated Real Estate Management specialisation as of 2026. Shoolini is the only option for candidates who want both the management credential and real estate domain depth without switching to a campus programme or a non-UGC certified course.

Shoolini holds NIRF #69 (University, 2025) and NAAC A+ accreditation. PAP available. EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 subjects are shared across all Shoolini MBA specialisations. Sem 3-4 below are specific to the Real Estate Management specialisation.

subjects.name: Legal Aspects of Business
subjects.desc: Business contracts, corporate governance, consumer protection obligations, and regulatory compliance frameworks for managers.

subjects.name: Retail Business Models
subjects.desc: Retail format structures, store operations management, retail supply chain basics, and omnichannel retail strategy.

subjects.name: Service Marketing
subjects.desc: Service quality gap model, SERVQUAL framework, service recovery strategy, and customer experience design.

subjects.name: Storytelling with Data
subjects.desc: Visual communication of data findings, chart selection, and translating analytics into business narratives for non-technical audiences.

subjects.name: Acing Interviews through AI
subjects.desc: AI-assisted mock interview practice, personal brand communication, and job-search strategy frameworks for management graduates.

subjects.name: Introduction to Editing
subjects.desc: Professional editing skills for business documents, reports, presentations, and digital content.

subjects.name: Future Leader's Program
subjects.desc: Executive presence building, stakeholder influence, high-performance team leadership, and personal effectiveness frameworks for emerging managers.

subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
subjects.desc: Supply chain network design, demand forecasting, procurement strategy, and vendor evaluation frameworks.

subjects.name: Customer Relationship Management
subjects.desc: CRM platform usage, customer lifecycle management, retention strategy design, and real estate sales pipeline management.

subjects.name: Capstone Project/Internship
subjects.desc: Applied industry project or internship integrating specialisation knowledge with structured business problem-solving.

subjects.name: Critical Thinking and Problem Solving
subjects.desc: Structured analytical frameworks for managerial decision-making, root-cause analysis, and complex business problem resolution.

whoHires.body:
Real Estate Management MBA graduates from Shoolini University Online are hired across India's real estate and construction sector:

**Industries:** Real estate developers, construction companies, property management firms, real estate broking, REITs, housing finance companies, PropTech startups, and government land acquisition bodies

**Entry-level roles:** Real Estate Executive, Site Manager (junior), Property Analyst, RERA Compliance Coordinator, Real Estate Relationship Manager, Valuation Assistant

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Project Manager (construction), RERA Compliance Manager, Real Estate Finance Manager, Leasing Manager, Property Portfolio Manager, PropTech Product Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Real Estate, Head of Land Acquisition, CFO (real estate developer), Director of Property Management, General Manager (construction company), REIT Fund Manager

**Top hiring organisations:** DLF, Godrej Properties, Prestige Estates, Sobha Developers, Brigade Group, L&T Realty, Tata Housing, HDFC Limited (housing finance), LIC Housing Finance, Piramal Realty, NoBroker, 99acres, Housing.com, and mid-market developers across North India, Punjab, and Chandigarh real estate markets

skills.body:
The Real Estate Management specialisation builds skills that real estate developers, housing finance companies, and construction firms need at manager level:

**Technical skills:**
- Property Valuation: income approach, sales comparison approach, cost approach, discounted cash flow for commercial property, and rental yield calculation
- RERA Compliance: RERA project registration requirements, disclosure obligations, builder-buyer agreement essentials, and homebuyer complaint resolution under RERA
- Real Estate Finance: project finance basics, loan against property structures, construction finance milestones, REIT structure overview, and real estate fund basics
- Construction Project Management: construction timeline planning, bill of quantities basics, contractor management, quality audit process, and project variation management

**Applied skills:**
- Real Estate Marketing: project launch strategy, channel partner management, digital marketing for real estate, and CRM for real estate sales pipelines
- Land Acquisition: due diligence checklist, land revenue record interpretation, encumbrance certificate reading, and title search basics

**Soft skills:** Presenting property investment proposals to institutional investors and HNIs, negotiating construction contracts and change orders, managing homebuyer escalations under RERA framework, and communicating project delays and recovery plans to developers and lenders.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Shoolini Online MBA Real Estate Management against peer programmes:

**No direct online peer in UGC-DEB approved programmes**: As of 2026, no other UGC-DEB approved online MBA university offers a dedicated Real Estate Management specialisation. Amity, NMIMS, CU, MUJ, LPU, JAIN, UPES, and SMU do not list Real Estate Management as a standalone MBA specialisation. Candidates who want both a recognised UGC-DEB entitled degree and real estate domain depth have no alternative in the online MBA space.

**vs campus-based Real Estate programmes**: RICS School of Built Environment (SBE) Amity offers a dedicated M.Sc. in Real Estate, and NICMAR offers Post Graduate programmes in Project Management and Real Estate - both are campus-based, requiring relocation and campus attendance, with higher fees. For working professionals in real estate who cannot relocate for a campus programme, Shoolini's online MBA is the only path to a recognised management credential with real estate specialisation.

**vs general MBA with real estate electives**: Some campus MBA programmes (IIM Ahmedabad, ISB) offer real estate electives. These are full-time campus programmes targeting a different candidate profile. For real estate professionals who are already working and want to upgrade credentials, Shoolini's online MBA at Rs 1,30,000 with PAP provides the credential without career disruption.

fees.body:
The Shoolini University Online MBA in Real Estate Management carries a regular fee of Rs 2,00,000 total across 4 semesters (2-year programme). A Rs 500 one-time application fee applies. No registration fee, no exam fees, no project fees beyond the programme fee.

**Two offer tracks**:

**Offer 1 - MBA with Pay After Placement (PAP)**:
- Rs 50,000 scholarship applied. Effective fee Rs 1,50,000 (25% savings).
- Payment split: Rs 1,20,000 before placement (Rs 30,000 x 4 semesters) + Rs 30,000 payable after confirmed placement.

**Offer 2 - MBA Opt-out from PAP**:
- Rs 70,000 scholarship applied. Effective fee Rs 1,30,000 (35% savings).
- Payment: Rs 32,500 x 4 semesters.

**Merit scholarship (10% additional)**:
For candidates scoring 90% or above in Class 12 (UG entry) or 90% or above in UG degree. Non-combinable with PAP or opt-out tracks, stackable with lump-sum and annual discounts.

**Additional payment discounts (stackable with merit only)**:
- 10% off on full course fee with single lump-sum payment
- Additional 5% off on annual payment in full

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Shoolini University (not via external marketing partners or NBFCs). Contact our counsellor for current tenure options.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Shoolini each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive a Shoolini University MBA degree certificate with Real Estate Management noted on the marksheet, issued under UGC-DEB 2020 online mode standards. This is the only UGC-DEB entitled online MBA degree in India with Real Estate Management noted on the marksheet — making Shoolini graduates uniquely positioned for real estate developer, housing finance, and REIT manager roles.

DigiLocker verification is available. The degree satisfies management qualification requirements for real estate project management, RERA compliance, and housing finance management roles at developers and NBFCs.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from Shoolini University Online MBA Real Estate Management alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Sandeep K.
items.liked: RERA compliance and property valuation subjects were directly applicable to my real estate developer work
items.disliked: PropTech and digital marketing for real estate content could be more current on OLX/99acres platform dynamics
items.body: I manage project RERA compliance for a Chandigarh real estate developer. RERA registration requirements, builder-buyer agreement provisions, and homebuyer complaint resolution were covered in depth - directly applicable to my role. No other online MBA offers this specialisation, which was the primary reason I chose Shoolini. The Financial Management core from Sem 2 helped me understand construction finance milestones better. NAAC A+ from NIRF #69 was accepted by my company for the Project Manager designation.

items.name: Priya N.
items.liked: Property valuation techniques covered multiple approaches - income, sales comparison, and DCF
items.disliked: More case studies from Delhi NCR and North India real estate market dynamics would strengthen the curriculum
items.body: I work in a housing finance company and needed an MBA with real estate domain depth. The property valuation and real estate finance subjects covered DCF valuation, loan against property structures, and REIT basics - exactly what I deal with. The Shoolini MBA is the only online option with this specialisation on the marksheet, which matters for my company's internal promotion track. PAP track gave me payment flexibility during a period of income uncertainty.

items.name: Vikas S.
items.liked: Land acquisition and due diligence content was practical for a construction company manager
items.disliked: Real estate taxation and capital gains subject should be a dedicated module - it's scattered across finance subjects
items.body: I manage a construction company in Punjab and needed a formal management degree with real estate domain knowledge. The land acquisition due diligence, construction project management, and contractor management subjects were directly applicable. Since no other online MBA offers this specialisation, Shoolini was the clear and only choice. Zero-cost EMI through the university made the Rs 1,30,000 opt-out fee very manageable.

faqs.question: Is Shoolini the only UGC-DEB approved online MBA with a Real Estate Management specialisation?
faqs.answer: As of 2026, yes. No other UGC-DEB approved online MBA university in India lists Real Estate Management as a standalone MBA specialisation. Amity, NMIMS, CU, MUJ, LPU, JAIN, UPES, and SMU all have general Finance or Operations specialisations but none with dedicated real estate management content on the degree certificate. Shoolini is the only option for working real estate professionals wanting a recognised management credential with domain-specific expertise.

faqs.question: What RERA compliance content is covered in the specialisation?
faqs.answer: The Real Estate Management specialisation covers RERA project registration requirements, mandatory disclosure obligations for builders, builder-buyer agreement essential clauses, penalties for non-compliance, the homebuyer grievance redressal process under RERA, and the role of Real Estate Regulatory Authorities across states. These are directly applicable for compliance, project management, and developer-side legal roles.

faqs.question: Is the Shoolini Real Estate MBA valid for housing finance company roles?
faqs.answer: Yes. The UGC-DEB entitled, NAAC A+ degree satisfies management degree requirements at housing finance companies, NBFCs, and banks for real estate lending, property valuation, and REIT management roles. The Real Estate Finance subject covers construction finance, loan against property, and REIT structure — directly relevant to housing finance company careers.

faqs.question: What property valuation methodologies are covered?
faqs.answer: The Real Estate Management specialisation covers the income capitalisation approach, sales comparison approach, and discounted cash flow method for commercial property. Rental yield calculation, cap rate analysis, and Land Revenue Record interpretation for valuation purposes are also covered. These are tested in property valuation, real estate finance, and RERA compliance role interviews.

faqs.question: How does the Pay After Placement option work for Real Estate Management candidates?
faqs.answer: PAP applies to all 16 Shoolini MBA specialisations. Under PAP, candidates pay Rs 1,20,000 before placement and Rs 30,000 after confirmed placement. For real estate professionals operating in a commission and project completion-linked income environment, PAP aligns the deferred fee payment with employment confirmation rather than requiring full upfront payment before the career transition is secured.

chooseIf: You work in real estate development, construction, property management, or housing finance and want the only UGC-DEB online MBA with Real Estate Management on the marksheet.
You need RERA compliance, property valuation, and real estate finance depth alongside a recognised management degree.
Your budget is Rs 1,30,000 with Pay After Placement option and NAAC A+ credential.
You cannot attend a campus programme (RICS SBE or NICMAR) due to work commitments.
consider: You want a campus-based M.Sc. in Real Estate with deeper specialisation depth (consider RICS School of Built Environment).
You need a programme from an IIM or ISB with real estate electives for investment management track applications.
You want a general MBA from a higher NIRF-ranked online university without the real estate specific focus.
